title: Amritsar, Punjab — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Amritsar, Punjab: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Amritsar is a city in Punjab with a population of 1,200,000. The spiritual center of Sikhism, home to the Golden Temple, known for its Punjabi culture, delicious cuisine, and historic Jallianwala Bagh.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
